faq.question: How long does jet lag last?
faq.answer: Rule of thumb: 1 day per timezone crossed going east, slightly less going west. A flight from NY to London (5 zones east) takes about 5-7 days for full adjustment.

faq.question: Is the Jet Lag Recovery Calculator free to use?
faq.answer: Yes, completely free with no signup required. Use it as many times as you need — there are no limits or hidden fees.

faq.question: How accurate is this calculator?
faq.answer: This calculator uses standard travel planning formulas trusted by travelers. Results are reliable estimates for planning purposes. For critical decisions, we recommend consulting a qualified professional to verify.

faq.question: What time zones crossed should I enter?
faq.answer: Enter the most accurate time zones crossed value you have available. If you're estimating, use a conservative figure. You can always run the calculator again with different values to see how changes affect the results.

faq.question: Can I use this calculator on my phone?
faq.answer: Yes, the Jet Lag Recovery Calculator is fully responsive and works on any device — phone, tablet, or desktop. No app download needed.

sections.title: What Is the Jet Lag Recovery Calculator?
sections.body: The Jet Lag Recovery Calculator is a free online tool designed for travelers who need quick, accurate calculations in the travel planning space. By entering your time zones crossed, direction, you get instant results including recovery days, body clock adjustment, top recovery tip. No formulas to memorize, no spreadsheets to build — just enter your numbers and get the answer in seconds. Whether you're a beginner or experienced professional, this calculator saves you time and eliminates guesswork.

sections.title: Why This Calculation Matters
sections.body: Getting recovery days right can make the difference between success and costly mistakes. In travel planning, small errors compound quickly. Manual calculations are error-prone and time-consuming, especially under pressure. This calculator applies proven formulas used by travelers worldwide, giving you confidence that your numbers are correct. Use it to plan your trips with precision and avoid common pitfalls that trip up beginners.

sections.title: When Should You Use This Calculator?
sections.body: This tool is most useful when you know your time zones crossed and need to find the right recovery days. It's also great for quick estimates before committing to a decision, and to double-check manual calculations or professional quotes, and when comparing different scenarios side by side. Bookmark this page and come back whenever you need a fast, reliable answer — the calculator is always free and requires no signup.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Time Zones Crossed
howToSteps.description: Type or select your time zones crossed in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Enter Your Direction
howToSteps.description: Type or select your direction in the field provided. Use the most accurate value available for best results.

howToSteps.title: Click Calculate
howToSteps.description: Hit the Calculate button to run the numbers. Results appear instantly below.

howToSteps.title: Review Your Results
howToSteps.description: Check your recovery days, body clock adjustment, top recovery tip. Use these figures to inform your next decision or compare against alternative scenarios.
